debug_info.goal:
w : Nat
x y : BitVec w
⊢ (x = y) = (BitVec.beq w x y = true)

failed_attempts:
apply propext
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hw : w = 0 ∨ w > 0 := Nat.eq_zero_or_pos w
    cases hw with
    | inl hz =>
      subst hz
      exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i i.isLt).elim
    | inr hpos =>
      have hi : i.val ≤ w - 1 := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.isLt (Nat.le_refl w))
      have hj : ∃ j, (w - 1) - j = i.val ∧ j ≤ w - 1 := by
        use (w - 1) - i.val
        constructor
        · omega
        · omega
      obtain ⟨j, hji, hjw⟩ := hj
      clear hi
      induction j generalizing i with
      | zero =>
        simp at hji
        unfold beq.go at h
        split at h
        · simp_all
          congr 1
          omega
        · simp_all
          have := And.right h
          unfold beq.go at this
          split at this
          · simp_all
            congr 1
            omega
          · simp_all
      | succ k ih =>
        unfold beq.go at h
        split at h
        · omega
        · simp at h
          have ⟨_, h'⟩ := h
          have hi' : i.val < w := i.isLt
          by_cases hcase : (w - 1) - (k + 1) = i.val
          · have := h.1
            simp [hcase] at this
            exact this
          · apply ih ⟨i.val, i.isLt⟩ h'
            omega
            rfl

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    induction w with
    | zero => simp [beq, beq.go]
    | succ n ih =>
      simp only [beq, beq.go]
      induction n with
      | zero => simp [beq.go]
      | succ m ihm =>
        simp only [beq.go, beq_self_eq_true, Bool.true_and]
        exact ihm
  · intro h
    ext i
    induction w with
    | zero => exact i.elim0
    | succ n ih =>
      simp only [beq, beq.go] at h
      have go_implies : ∀ k, beq.go n x y k = true → ∀ j : Fin (n + 1), j.val ≥ n - k → x.getLsbD j = y.getLsbD j := by
        intro k
        induction k with
        | zero =>
          simp only [beq.go, beq_eq_true_iff_eq]
          intro heq j hj
          have : j.val = n := by omega
          simp only [Nat.succ_sub_succ_eq_sub, Nat.sub_zero] at heq
          have hj_eq : j.val = n := this
          simp only [getLsbD, Nat.lt_succ_of_lt, hj_eq, heq]
        | succ m ihm =>
          simp only [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true, beq_eq_true_iff_eq]
          intro ⟨heq, hgo⟩ j hj
          by_cases hjm : j.val = n - (m + 1)
          · simp only [getLsbD, hjm, heq]
          · have : j.val ≥ n - m := by omega
            exact ihm hgo j this
      by_cases hn : n = 0
      · subst hn
        simp only [beq, Nat.add_one_sub_one, Nat.sub_zero, beq.go, beq_eq_true_iff_eq] at h
        have : i.val = 0 := by omega
        simp only [getLsbD, this, h]
      · have := go_implies (n - 1) (by simp only [Nat.sub_add_cancel (Nat.one_le_iff_ne_zero.mpr hn)]; exact h)
        have hi : i.val ≥ n - (n - 1) := by omega
        exact this ⟨i.val, i.isLt⟩ hi

apply propext
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    have hi := i.isLt
    unfold beq at h
    by_cases hw : w = 0
    · omega
    · have hpos : 0 < w := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hw
      have : w - 1 - (w - 1 - i.val) = i.val := by omega
      induction w - 1 generalizing with
      | zero =>
        simp only [beq.go, beq_iff_eq, decide_eq_true_eq] at h
        have : w = 1 := by omega
        have : i.val = 0 := by omega
        simp_all
      | succ n ih =>
        simp only [beq.go, beq_iff_eq, decide_eq_true_eq, Bool.and_eq_true] at h
        obtain ⟨hl, hr⟩ := h
        by_cases hc : i.val = w - 1 - (n + 1)
        · simp_all
        · exact ih (by omega) hr (by omega)

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction (w - 1) with
    | zero => simp
    | succ i ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    ext i
    unfold beq at h
    have : ∀ n, beq.go w x y n = true → ∀ j, j ≤ n → x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by
      intro n
      induction n with
      | zero =>
        intro hgo j hj
        simp at hj
        subst hj
        unfold beq.go at hgo
        simp at hgo
        exact hgo
      | succ n ih =>
        intro hgo j hj
        unfold beq.go at hgo
        simp only [Bool.and_eq_true, beq_iff_eq] at hgo
        cases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le hj with
        | inl hlt =>
          exact ih hgo.2 j (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp hlt)
        | inr heq =>
          subst heq
          exact hgo.1
    by_cases hw : w = 0
    · subst hw
      exact i.elim0
    · have hwpos : 0 < w := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hw
      by_cases hi : i < w
      · have : i.val ≤ w - 1 := by omega
        have key := this (w - 1) h (w - 1 - i.val) (by omega)
        simp only [Nat.sub_sub_self this] at key
        have : w - 1 - (w - 1 - i.val) = i.val := by omega
        simp [this] at key
        exact key
      · simp [getLsbD_ge _ _ (Nat.not_lt.mp hi)]

simp only [beq, eq_comm]
  apply propext
  constructor <;> intro h
  · subst h
    induction (w - 1) with
    | zero => simp [beq.go]
    | succ n ih => simp [beq.go, ih]
  · ext i
    induction (w - 1) with
    | zero => 
      simp only [beq.go, beq_iff_eq] at h
      by_cases hi : i.val = w - 1
      · have : i = ⟨w - 1, by omega⟩ := Fin.ext hi
        rw [this]; exact h
      · have : w ≤ i.val ∨ i.val < w - 1 := by omega
        rcases this with hw | hw
        · simp [getLsbD_ge _ _ (by omega : w ≤ i.val)]
        · simp [getLsbD_ge _ _ (by omega : w ≤ i.val)]
    | succ n ih =>
      simp only [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true, beq_iff_eq] at h
      by_cases hi : i.val = (w - 1) - (n + 1)
      · have : i = ⟨(w - 1) - (n + 1), by omega⟩ := Fin.ext hi
        rw [this]; exact h.1  
      · exact ih h.2

simp only [eq_iff_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction (w - 1) with
    | zero => simp
    | succ i ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    induction w with
    | zero => exact (i.isLt).elim
    | succ n ih =>
      unfold beq.go at h
      induction (n - 0) generalizing i with
      | zero =>
        simp at h
        have hi : i.val = n := by omega
        simp only [Nat.succ_sub_succ_eq_sub, Nat.sub_zero] at h
        have : i = ⟨n, Nat.lt_succ_self n⟩ := Fin.ext hi
        rw [this]
        exact h
      | succ j ihj =>
        simp at h
        obtain ⟨hcurr, hrest⟩ := h
        by_cases hcase : i.val = n - (j + 1)
        · have : i = ⟨n - (j + 1), by omega⟩ := Fin.ext hcase
          rw [this]
          simp only [Nat.succ_sub_succ_eq_sub, Nat.sub_zero] at hcurr
          exact hcurr
        · exact ihj hrest i

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff_eq_true]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hw : w > 0 := by
      by_contra hc
      simp at hc
      simp [hc] at i
      exact Fin.elim0 i
    induction w - 1 generalizing i with
    | zero => 
      simp [beq.go] at h
      cases Nat.eq_or_gt_of_le (Nat.zero_le i.val) with
      | inl heq => 
        have : i = ⟨0, hw⟩ := Fin.ext (heq.symm)
        simp [this, h]
      | inr hgt =>
        have : i.val ≥ 1 := hgt
        have : i.val < w := i.isLt
        omega
    | succ n ih =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := h
      by_cases hi : i.val = w - 1 - (n + 1)
      · have : i = ⟨w - 1 - (n + 1), by omega⟩ := Fin.ext hi
        simp only [this] at h1 ⊢
        exact h1
      · apply ih h2
        omega

apply propext
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq
    suffices ∀ n, beq.go w x x n = true by exact this (w - 1)
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero => simp [beq.go]
    | succ n ih => simp [beq.go, ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hi := i.isLt
    by_cases hw : w = 0
    · omega
    · have hwpos : 0 < w := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hw
      have : ∃ k, k ≤ w - 1 ∧ i.val = w - 1 - k := by
        use w - 1 - i.val
        omega
      obtain ⟨k, hk, hik⟩ := this
      have haux : ∀ n, n ≤ w - 1 → beq.go w x y n = true → 
        ∀ j, j ≤ n → x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by
        intro n
        induction n with
        | zero => 
          intro _ hgo j hj
          simp at hj
          subst hj
          simp [beq.go] at hgo
          exact hgo
        | succ n ih =>
          intro hn hgo j hj
          simp [beq.go] at hgo
          obtain ⟨heq, hrest⟩ := hgo
          cases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le hj with
          | inl hlt => 
            exact ih (by omega) hrest j (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp hlt)
          | inr heqj => 
            subst heqj
            exact heq
      have := haux (w - 1) (Nat.le_refl _) h k hk
      simp [hik] at this
      convert this using 1 <;> congr <;> omega

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff_eq]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    ext i
    unfold beq at h
    induction w with
    | zero => exact i.elim0
    | succ w' ih =>
      have hw : w'.succ - 1 = w' := Nat.succ_sub_one w'
      simp only [hw] at h
      by_cases hi : i.val ≤ w'
      · have : ∃ j : Nat, w' - j = i.val ∧ j ≤ w' := by
          use w' - i.val
          omega
        obtain ⟨j, hj, hjw⟩ := this
        clear ih
        induction j generalizing i with
        | zero =>
          simp at hj
          unfold beq.go at h
          cases w' with
          | zero =>
            simp at h
            have : i.val = 0 := by omega
            simp_all
          | succ w'' =>
            simp at h
            have : i.val = w''.succ := by omega
            have hi' : i = ⟨w''.succ, by omega⟩ := by ext; omega
            simp [hi'] at h ⊢
            exact h.1
        | succ k ihk =>
          unfold beq.go at h
          cases w' with
          | zero => omega
          | succ w'' =>
            simp at h
            have hk : k ≤ w'' := by omega
            have hji : w''.succ - (k + 1) = i.val := by omega
            exact ihk h.2 ⟨i.val, by omega⟩ hk hji rfl
      · have : i.val = w' + 1 := by omega
        exact (Nat.lt_irrefl _ (this ▸ i.isLt)).elim

  constructor
  · intro h

    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hw : w > 0 := by
      by_contra hc
      simp at hc
      subst hc
      exact i.elim0
    have go_true : ∀ k, beq.go w x y k = true → 
      ∀ j, j ≤ k → x.getLsbD ((w - 1) - j) = y.getLsbD ((w - 1) - j) := by
      intro k
      induction k with
      | zero => 
        intro hk j hj
        simp at hj
        subst hj
        unfold beq.go at hk
        simp at hk
        exact hk
      | succ n ih =>
        intro hk j hj
        unfold beq.go at hk
        simp only [Bool.and_eq_true, beq_iff_eq] at hk
        cases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le hj with
        | inl hlt => 
          apply ih hk.2 j (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp hlt)
        | inr heq =>
          subst heq
          exact hk.1
    have hi : i.val ≤ w - 1 := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.isLt (Nat.le_refl w))
    have key := go_true (w - 1) h (w - 1 - i.val) (Nat.sub_le _ _)
    have : (w - 1) - (w - 1 - i.val) = i.val := by omega
    simp only [this] at key
    simp only [getLsbD_eq_getElem?, getElem?_eq_some_iff_lt]
    split
    · split
      · simp [key]
      · omega
    · omega

apply propext
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h

    have go_true : ∀ k, beq.go w x y k = true → 
      ∀ j, j ≤ k → x.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) = y.getLsbD (w - 1 - j) := by
      intro k
      induction k with
      | zero => 
        intro hg j hj
        simp at hj
        subst hj
        simp [beq.go] at hg
        exact hg
      | succ n ih =>
        intro hg j hj
        simp [beq.go] at hg
        obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := hg
        cases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le hj with
        | inl hlt => exact ih h2 j (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp hlt)
        | inr heq => subst heq; exact h1
    by_cases hw : w = 0
    · subst hw; exact i.elim0
    · have hi : i.val ≤ w - 1 := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Nat.sub_one_lt_of_lt i.isLt)
      have := go_true (w - 1) h (w - 1 - i.val) (by omega)
      simp only [Nat.sub_sub_eq_min, Nat.min_self] at this
      convert this using 2 <;> omega

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp [beq.go]
    | succ n ih => simp [beq.go, ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    have hi : i < w := i.isLt
    induction w - 1 generalizing i with
    | zero =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      cases w with
      | zero => exact (Nat.not_lt_zero i.val hi).elim
      | succ w' =>
        simp at h
        have : i.val = w' := by omega
        simp only [Fin.getLsbD, this, h]
    | succ n ih =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      obtain ⟨heq, hgo⟩ := h
      by_cases hcase : i.val = w - 1 - (n + 1)
      · simp only [Fin.getLsbD, hcase, heq]
      · exact ih hgo i hi

apply propext
  constructor
  · intro h; simp [h, beq]; induction (w-1) <;> simp_all [beq.go]
  · intro h; ext i; unfold beq at h
    have : ∀ n, beq.go w x y n = true → ∀ j, (w - 1) - n ≤ j → j < w → x.getLsbD j = y.getLsbD j := by
      intro n
      induction n with
      | zero => intro hgo j hj1 hj2; simp [beq.go] at hgo; omega_nat; simp_all
      | succ n ih => 
        intro hgo j hj1 hj2
        simp [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true] at hgo
        by_cases hj : j = (w - 1) - (n + 1)
        · simp [hj, hgo.1]
        · exact ih hgo.2 j (by omega) hj2
    exact this (w - 1) h i (by omega) i.isLt

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff_eq_true]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hw : w > 0 := by
      by_contra hc
      simp at hc
      subst hc
      exact i.isLt.elim
    induction w - 1 generalizing i with
    | zero =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      have hi : i = ⟨0, hw⟩ := by
        apply Fin.ext
        omega
      subst hi
      simp at h
      exact h
    | succ n ih =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      obtain ⟨h1, h2⟩ := h
      by_cases hi : i.val = w - 1 - (n + 1)
      · have : i = ⟨w - 1 - (n + 1), by omega⟩ := Fin.ext hi
        subst this
        exact h1
      · apply ih (by omega : w - 1 = n + (w - 1 - n)) h2
        omega

apply propext
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h

    have : ∀ k, beq.go w x y k = true → ∀ j : Fin w, j.val ≥ w - 1 - k → x.getLsbD j = y.getLsbD j := by
      intro k
      induction k with
      | zero =>
        simp only [beq.go, beq_eq_true_iff_eq]
        intro heq j hj
        have : j.val = w - 1 := Nat.le_antisymm (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp j.isLt) hj
        simp [this, heq]
      | succ n ih =>
        simp only [beq.go, beq_eq_true_iff_eq, Bool.and_eq_true]

        · simp [hc, heq]

    exact this (w - 1) h i (Nat.zero_le _)

      · omega
      · omega
    obtain ⟨k, hk, hkw⟩ := this
    have hgo : ∀ m, beq.go w x y m = true → ∀ j ≤ m, x.getLsbD ((w - 1) - j) = y.getLsbD ((w - 1) - j) := by
      intro m
      induction m with
      | zero =>
        intro hm j hj
        simp at hj
        subst hj
        unfold beq.go at hm
        simp at hm
        exact hm
      | succ n ih =>
        intro hm j hj
        unfold beq.go at hm
        simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.and_eq_true] at hm
        obtain ⟨hcur, hrest⟩ := hm
        cases Nat.lt_or_eq_of_le hj with
        | inl hlt =>
          exact ih hrest j (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp hlt)
        | inr heq =>
          subst heq
          exact hcur
    exact hgo (w - 1) h ((w - 1) - i.val) (by omega) ▸ (by simp_all)

simp only [eq_iff_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction (w - 1) with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    induction w with
    | zero => exact i.elim0
    | succ w' ih =>
      have hi : i.val ≤ w' := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp i.isLt
      unfold beq.go at h
      induction w' with
      | zero =>
        simp at h
        have : i.val = 0 := Nat.le_zero.mp hi
        simp only [this, h]
      | succ n ihn =>
        simp only [Nat.succ_sub_one] at h
        by_cases hcase : i.val = n + 1
        · cases h
          simp only [hcase]
          rename_i hleft _
          simp at hleft
          exact hleft
        · have hi' : i.val ≤ n := Nat.lt_of_le_of_ne (Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp hi) hcase
          apply ihn
          · exact Nat.lt_succ_of_le hi'
          · exact (Bool.and_eq_true.mp h).2
          · exact hi'

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    induction w with
    | zero => exact i.elim0
    | succ w' ih =>
      have hbound : i.val < w' + 1 := i.isLt
      generalize hw : w' + 1 - 1 = wm at h
      simp at hw
      subst hw
      induction w' with
      | zero =>
        have hi : i = ⟨0, Nat.zero_lt_one⟩ := Fin.ext (Nat.lt_one_iff.mp hbound)
        subst hi
        unfold beq.go at h
        simp at h
        exact h
      | succ n ihn =>
        unfold beq.go at h
        simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.and_eq_true] at h
        obtain ⟨hleft, hright⟩ := h
        by_cases hi : i.val = n + 1 - (n + 1)
        · simp at hi
          have : (n + 1 + 1 - 1) - (n + 1) = 0 := by omega
          rw [this] at hleft
          have hi' : i = ⟨0, by omega⟩ := Fin.ext hi
          simp [hi']
          exact hleft
        · have hilt : i.val < n + 1 := by omega
          exact ihn hright ⟨i.val, hilt⟩ rfl

apply propext
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction (w - 1) with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hi : i.val ≤ w - 1 ∨ i.val > w - 1 := Nat.le_or_lt i.val (w - 1)
    cases hi with
    | inl hle =>
      have : w - 1 - (w - 1 - i.val) = i.val := by omega
      induction (w - 1) with
      | zero =>
        simp [beq.go] at h
        have : i.val = 0 := by omega
        simp_all
      | succ n ih =>
        simp only [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true, beq_iff_eq] at h
        by_cases hcase : i.val = w - 1 - (n + 1)
        · rw [← hcase]
          exact h.1
        · apply ih h.2
          omega
    | inr hgt =>
      have : i.val ≥ w := by omega
      have hi' : i.val < w := i.isLt
      omega
sorry

propext ⟨fun h => by subst h; unfold beq; induction (w - 1) <;> simp_all [beq.go],
           fun h => by ext i; unfold beq at h; omega_nat⟩

apply propext
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq
    suffices ∀ n, beq.go w x x n = true by exact this (w - 1)
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero => simp [beq.go]
    | succ n ih => simp [beq.go, ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hi : i < w := i.isLt
    suffices ∀ n, beq.go w x y n = true → ∀ j, (w - 1) - n ≤ j → j ≤ w - 1 → x.getLsbD j = y.getLsbD j by
      have := this (w - 1) h i.val (by omega) (by omega)
      exact this
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp only [beq.go, beq_iff_eq]
      intro heq j hj1 hj2
      have : j = w - 1 := by omega
      subst this
      exact heq
    | succ n ih =>
      simp only [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true, beq_iff_eq]
      intro ⟨heq, hgo⟩ j hj1 hj2
      by_cases hj : j = (w - 1) - (n + 1)
      · subst hj; exact heq
      · exact ih hgo j (by omega) hj2

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff_eq_true]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hw : w > 0 := by
      by_contra hc
      simp at hc
      subst hc
      exact i.elim0
    have hi : i.val ≤ w - 1 := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.isLt (Nat.le_refl w))
    have : ∃ k, w - 1 - k = i.val ∧ k ≤ w - 1 := by
      use w - 1 - i.val
      constructor
      · omega
      · omega
    obtain ⟨k, hk, hkw⟩ := this
    clear hi
    generalize hw' : w - 1 = w' at h hkw hk
    induction k generalizing w' with
    | zero =>
      simp at hk
      subst hk
      unfold beq.go at h
      cases w' with
      | zero => simpa using h
      | succ n => simp at h; exact h.2
    | succ n ih =>
      unfold beq.go at h
      cases w' with
      | zero => omega
      | succ m =>
        simp at h
        have hkm : n ≤ m := by omega
        have hk' : m - n = i.val := by omega
        exact ih m h.1 hkm hk'

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_eq]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hw : w > 0 := by
      by_contra hc
      simp at hc
      simp [hc] at i
      exact Fin.elim0 i
    have hle : i.val ≤ w - 1 := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp (Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.isLt (Nat.le_refl w))
    have : ∃ j, j ≤ w - 1 ∧ (w - 1) - j = i.val := by
      use (w - 1) - i.val
      constructor
      · exact Nat.sub_le (w - 1) i.val
      · omega
    obtain ⟨j, hj1, hj2⟩ := this
    revert h
    generalize hw' : w - 1 = w'
    intro h
    induction j generalizing w' with
    | zero =>
      cases w' with
      | zero =>
        simp [beq.go] at h
        simp at hj2
        have : i.val = w - 1 := by omega
        rw [← this] at h
        exact h
      | succ w'' =>
        simp [beq.go] at h
        have : (w - 1) - 0 = w'' + 1 := by omega
        simp at hj2
        rw [← hj2, this] at h
        exact h.1
    | succ j' ih =>
      cases w' with
      | zero => omega
      | succ w'' =>
        simp [beq.go] at h
        apply ih h.2
        · omega
        · omega

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    ext i
    unfold beq at h
    induction w - 1 generalizing i with
    | zero =>
      simp only [beq.go] at h
      by_cases hi : i.val = w - 1
      · simp only [beq_eq_true_iff] at h
        have : i = ⟨w - 1, by omega⟩ := by ext; omega
        rw [this]
        simp only [Nat.sub_zero] at h
        exact h
      · have : i.val ≥ w := by omega
        simp [getLsbD, Nat.testBit, Nat.shiftRight_eq_div_pow]
        have hx : x.toNat < 2^w := x.isLt
        have hy : y.toNat < 2^w := y.isLt
        have : 2^i.val ≥ 2^w := Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) this
        omega
    | succ n ih =>
      simp only [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true, beq_eq_true_iff] at h
      by_cases hi : i.val = w - 1 - (n + 1)
      · have : i = ⟨w - 1 - (n + 1), by omega⟩ := by ext; omega
        rw [this]
        exact h.1
      · apply ih h.2
        omega

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction (w - 1) with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    induction w with
    | zero => omega
    | succ w' ih =>
      have hi : i.val ≤ w' := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp i.isLt
      induction w' with
      | zero =>
        simp at hi
        simp only [hi]
        unfold beq.go at h
        simp at h
        exact h
      | succ n ihn =>
        unfold beq.go at h
        simp only [beq_iff_eq, Bool.and_eq_true, decide_eq_true_eq] at h
        obtain ⟨hlsb, hrest⟩ := h
        by_cases hcase : i.val = n + 1
        · simp only [hcase]
          convert hlsb using 2 <;> omega
        · have hi' : i.val ≤ n := by omega
          apply ihn hi' hrest

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_true_iff_eq_true]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction w - 1 with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hw : w > 0 := by
      by_contra hc
      simp at hc
      subst hc
      exact i.elim0
    have hi : i.val ≤ w - 1 := Nat.lt_succ_iff.mp i.isLt
    have : ∃ k, w - 1 - k = i.val ∧ k ≤ w - 1 := by
      use w - 1 - i.val
      omega
    obtain ⟨k, hk, hkw⟩ := this
    generalize hw' : w - 1 = w' at h
    induction w' generalizing k with
    | zero =>
      simp [beq.go] at h
      have : k = 0 := by omega
      subst this
      simp at hk
      simp [hk, h]
    | succ n ih =>
      simp only [beq.go, Bool.and_eq_true, beq_eq_true_iff_eq] at h
      obtain ⟨heq, hrest⟩ := h
      cases k with
      | zero =>
        simp at hk
        simp [hk, heq, hw']
      | succ k' =>
        have hk'w : k' ≤ n := by omega
        have hk' : n - k' = i.val := by omega
        exact ih hrest k' hk' hk'w rfl

simp only [eq_iff_iff, beq_iff_eq]
  constructor
  · intro h
    subst h
    unfold beq beq.go
    induction (w - 1) with
    | zero => simp
    | succ n ih => simp [ih]
  · intro h
    apply BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq
    intro i
    unfold beq at h
    have hw : w = 0 ∨ w > 0 := Nat.eq_zero_or_pos w
    cases hw with
    | inl hz =>
      subst hz
      exact i.elim0
    | inr hpos =>
      have hi : i.val < w := i.isLt
      have : i.val ≤ w - 1 := Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt hi
      have hk : ∃ k, k ≤ w - 1 ∧ (w - 1) - k = i.val := by
        use (w - 1) - i.val
        constructor
        · exact Nat.sub_le (w - 1) i.val
        · omega
      obtain ⟨k, hk_le, hk_eq⟩ := hk
      revert h
      generalize hw1 : w - 1 = w1
      intro h
      induction k generalizing w1 with
      | zero =>
        simp at hk_eq
        subst hk_eq
        unfold beq.go at h
        cases w1 with
        | zero => simp at h; exact h
        | succ n =>
          simp at h
          exact h.1
      | succ k ih =>
        cases w1 with
        | zero => omega
        | succ n =>
          unfold beq.go at h
          simp at h
          have hk_le' : k ≤ n := by omega
          have hk_eq' : n - k = i.val := by omega
          exact ih n h.2 hk_le' hk_eq' rfl

propext ⟨fun h => by subst h; unfold beq; induction w - 1 <;> simp_all [beq.go],
           fun h => BitVec.eq_of_getLsbD_eq fun i => by
             unfold beq at h
             induction w - 1 generalizing i with
             | zero => simp_all [beq.go]; omega
             | succ n ih => simp [beq.go] at h; by_cases hc : i.val = (w-1)-(n+1) <;> simp_all⟩
